title: loxogramme coriacea
intro: Loxogramme coriacea, also known as the Chinese fan fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Loxogramme coriacea include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Loxogramme coriacea is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
